skills.name: mcp-server-creation
outputHeadings: tool inventory with Use this when... descriptions
JSON schemas for each tool input and output

workflows.workflowClassCoverageNotes: Canonical implementation handoff example exists and captures execution evidence posture.
Canonical planning example exists and is template- and contract-aligned.
No dedicated canonical intake example is currently maintained; class remains contract-backed and validator-backed via routing and gate checks.
Migration class references planning, review, and handoff examples as bounded portable projections.
Readiness/release class is covered through certification review and handoff example projections.
No dedicated canonical spec/authority mapping example is currently maintained; class remains contract-backed via workflow routing and output contracts.
Canonical review example exists and aligns to validation and certification contracts.

tools.name: deploy-readiness-gate
tools.purpose: Check whether a change is ready for guarded live deployment or release promotion.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Deployment context such as local, staging, or production.

tools.failureBehavior: Return BLOCKED until required gates and validations pass.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: env-secret-validator
tools.purpose: Verify required runtime environment variables are present and not obvious placeholders.
tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when required variables are missing or unsafe.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: issue-to-task-sync
tools.purpose: Convert issues or notes into task packets with scope, ownership, and acceptance criteria.
tools.failureBehavior: Return a conservative packet when issue detail is incomplete.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use planning skills to finalize the packet

tools.name: log-journal-query
tools.purpose: Query logs, journals, and prior runs for prior decisions and learned constraints.
tools.failureBehavior: Return no matches instead of guessing if evidence is absent.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: patch-applicator-with-review-gate
tools.purpose: Alias of approval-gated-write-executor. Apply a patch only after an explicit review gate has been satisfied.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: New file content or patch payload.

outputs.name: writeReceipt
outputs.description: Write confirmation with resolved target path.

tools.failureBehavior: Refuse writes when approval is missing or the target escapes the repo root.

tools.name: pr-review-assembler
tools.purpose: Assemble a PR review payload from diff, tests, risks, and follow-up items.
tools.failureBehavior: Return a structured review stub if the diff is incomplete.
tools.exampleInvocation: Use $post-implementation-review-writer to synthesize the PR review.

tools.name: premerge-gate-runner
tools.purpose: Run deterministic premerge gates for package and repo changes.
tools.failureBehavior: Return non-zero if validation or diff checks fail.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: regression-comparator
tools.purpose: Compare two artifacts, diffs, or outputs and summarize regressions.
tools.failureBehavior: Stub out if the two artifacts cannot be parsed consistently.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use diff and validation scripts as needed

tools.name: staging-prod-context-switcher
tools.purpose: Switch operator context between staging and production assumptions without changing code.
tools.failureBehavior: Refuse to infer production state without explicit evidence.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use readiness checks and environment validation first

tools.name: structured-plan-generator
tools.purpose: Turn a broad request into bounded implementation waves and gates.
tools.failureBehavior: Return a structured plan or a blocker list; never invent unknown repo facts.
tools.exampleInvocation: Use $planning-slice-builder to split the request into waves.

tools.name: symbol-dependency-tracer
tools.purpose: Trace a symbol or contract through the repository to show dependency boundaries.
tools.failureBehavior: Return a contract-level stub if deep analysis is unavailable.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use repo search plus local analysis scripts

tools.name: tool-namespace-loader
tools.purpose: Load and list the supported tool namespace and available tool contracts.

outputs.name: namespace
outputs.description: List of available tools and statuses.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero if the catalog is missing or malformed.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

providers.name: openai-codex
providers.notes: Codex is now represented as a compatibility export beneath the OpenAI-Codex adapter.

providers.name: anthropic-claude
providers.notes: Use provider adapters to compile prompt and tool bundles.

providers.name: qwen-code
providers.notes: Treat trust and tool filtering as adapter responsibilities.

providers.name: kimi-k2_5
providers.notes: Use schema validation in the core; keep JSON mode assumptions narrow.
